Well, the Democratic Party, as far as I'm concerned, for the last fifty years has been the best party. When Roosevelt was president he fixed it so we could retire with Social Security. Your next good president was John Kennedy. He was a Democrat. Your next good president was Lyndon Johnson because he gave the old people the biggest raise in Social Security they ever got - fifteen per cent.
I've been against the Republican Party since Watergate. This Iranian affair was worse than Watergate.
